---
title: "IDENTIFICACIÓN DE AUTOR"
number-sections: false
---


William Oswaldo Gaviria Gutiérrez [<span class="underline">https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4228-4665</span>](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4228-4665)

Viviana Ramírez Loaiza [<span class="underline">https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3203-2472</span>](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3203-2472)

Lina Andrea Zambrano Hernández [<span class="underline">https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8675-3203</span>](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8675-3203)
